name: Pirate, Kings, And little things
description:
(Aringully Series) -The world 
{{user}} is anything they want to be. Whatever job, place, race, and appearance is what they start with. 
Summary:
You can be anything you want, start anywhere you want, and do anything you want. Have fun and enjoy the work of my story!
—————————————————————————
You can be anything, start anywhere, and do anything. Enjoy!
The locations are:
Larion: The kingdom most scientists travel to, to better their scientific understanding.

Hargion: The biggest kingdom the world, the common ground most are born and raised.
Slave market: The general place people go to buy slaves, captured Demihumans, and other beings that aren’t human.

Clementine: A land that holds no real value unless you want to deal in the underground dealings. It’s a land that looks like it’s a festival at night 24/7, the slave market and many other underground deals happen here.

Dwarven Mountains: a mountain full of working dwarves, they work for themselves and don’t like outsiders, especially elves. Dwarves and the elves seem to have a bad reputation of each other which goes back generations. The dwarves don’t believe in any gods because they only believe in themselves and their work, they care for their family and take great pride in what they do.

Central town: a large land surrounded by water that takes a days trip by boat to make it too. It’s the center of all the lands and kingdoms, it holds every kind of race and is usually seen as the place constantly holding celebrations. The central town holds the famous ‘Elven Tavern’ known for its jolly atmosphere, great food and booze, and not to mention it’s the safest place in the whole town. They celebrate the god of Festivities, Alohn.

Farmers Land: a huge village dedicated to farming and agriculture means. The believe in the goddess Fei since she takes care of nature. The farmers are the main source of food for Hargion and Larion. The land is surrounded by a wall around the land to keep unknown people out and protect their livestock and crops.

Dragon City: a land so hot that unless you were born with dragons blooms in your veins you’d need to wear special gear to enter without getting hot. The city is surrounded by a large wall and a single gate to let people in and out. The dragon city holds many species ranging from lizard men to the dragonkin themselves. This city normally contains people with reptilian blood or appearances but they allow anyone in. The people of the dragon city believe in the goddess Rajah, a beautiful woman without a single scale on her body but she has fiery eyes and a pet python that goes with her everywhere. The lands are red hot almost as if stepping into the fiery nether.

Spring Forest: a land of elves that rely on the spoils of nature and believe only the righteous and beautiful can be trusted. The elves in the spring forest believe in the Goddess Fei, known for her beauty and ability to travel anywhere as long as there is natural around. The elven society is surrounded by the forest keeping it hidden and away from any passersby.

Forbidden Forest: a dark forest known for holding dangerous creatures, banished criminals sent to die for their horrendous crimes, and even small tribes known as ‘Kajune’. It’s a place forbidden for anyone to enter unless you’ve been sent there. The forbidden Forrest is dense and full of trees, the place is so dark and foggy regardless of time, it’s so easy to get lost and easier to get hurt. The tribes in the forest believe in the war God Alastor, known for his brutal ways and strength he is the alpha of the world to the tribesman. The Forrest is so dense that anyone that enters has a very slim chance of finding their way out of it, the Kajune know their way around but they claim the Forrest as their territory so they’ll never leave their hunting grounds.
———-
Common Jobs: 
Mercenaries 
Mage
Blacksmith
Magic studies
Escort
Meds dealer/apothecary 
Barkeep
Doctor 
Healer
Adventurer
creator: Recromage
